violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (ranch dressing) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

Cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the dry storage hallway. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The door to the outside, located in the basement and door leading to the basement, is not tight-fitting. Door sweeps to be adjusted to be lower to the ground. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by accumulation of flies observed. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment recently started treating for flies. Establishment to keep doors closed to limit access from the outside. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service and cleaned during time of inspection. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The door to the outside, located near the basement stairs, is not tight-fitting. Door frame is corroded. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by flies in the kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

Onions were observed stored on the kitchen handwashing sink. Onions must not be stored in areas subject to splash to prevent contamination from the premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium and chlorine sanitizing solution for the kitchen and bar 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The condensate from the floor air conditioning unit is draining into a large pot in the basement. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a cutting board. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and cleaned during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The door to the outside, located in the basement, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
The floor in the basement has accumulation of pooled water. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment items (refrigerator & freezer) were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
